offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, payroll tax filing inconsistencies cause compliance penalties. We cross-validate payroll tax filings with internal records instead of manual reconciliation.
problem: Inconsistencies between payroll tax filings and internal payroll records.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for payroll records and notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing payroll data
Enable one-click export of compliance reports
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
